channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Fortune 500 CEO spring cleaning favors company veterans
item.description: CEO shakeup sweeping the Fortune 500 favors leaders built in-house.

item.title: DOJ uses WHCD shooting to pressure preservationists
item.description: Assistant Attorney General gave until 9 a.m. Monday to drop lawsuit over Trump's ballroom.

item.title: After Trump shooting attempt, CEOs need new security playbook
item.description: Also: News and watercooler chat from Fortune.

item.title: Manifesto, train ride, security gaps let shooter near Trump
item.description: Key details before you reach the office this morning.
